bead.title: auto-route: --model pin prefers configured subscription harness over fiz/openrouter fallback
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Pinning --model sonnet-4.6 against a configuration that includes the claude subscription harness routes to fiz/openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6 (score 196.0) instead of the claude subscription path. The openrouter route then fails 401 because no auth header is configured. The user's intent — "give me sonnet on the same auth I already have" — is not honored; a separate per-token provider is selected.

ROOT CAUSE (pointers; confirm during fix)
- Model-to-harness resolution under --model pin prefers the openrouter route registered in catalog (surfaces include openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6) over a configured subscription harness whose SupportedModels covers sonnet. Verify the resolution path used by --model pinning (likely the same candidate construction in service_routing.go:1172-1189 plus the model-to-route mapping in service_models.go).
- The catalog's openrouter_id for sonnet-4.6 is what surfaces this fallback; the gap is preference order, not the catalog entry itself.

PROPOSED FIX (direction)
When --model is pinned and a configured subscription harness lists that model (or a normalized alias) in its SupportedModels, the dispatch destination must be that harness — not fiz/openrouter. fiz/openrouter remains the destination only when no configured subscription harness advertises the pinned model.

NON-SCOPE
- Enumeration of sibling tiers under policy=default (sibling child enumerate-per-tier-candidates).
- Scoring-based tier selection under policy=default (sibling child cost-aware-tier-selection).
- filter_reason emission for excluded tiers (sibling child explicit-filter-reason).
- Fixing the openrouter 401 (separate Fizeau config issue — needs auth header configured).
- DDx-side changes; catalog metadata.

CROSS-REF
https://github.com/easel/fizeau/issues/6
bead.acceptance:
1. TestModelPinPrefersSubscriptionHarnessOverOpenrouter — given a Fizeau config with the claude subscription harness present (SupportedModels covers sonnet-4.6) and the fiz/openrouter route also catalog-known for sonnet-4.6, a request with --model sonnet-4.6 (no --harness/--provider override) dispatches to the claude harness. Verified by asserting the resolved harness identifier on the dispatched request (mock the harness boundary; do not require a live openrouter endpoint).
2. TestModelPinFallsBackWhenNoSubscriptionHarnessAdvertisesModel — when no configured subscription harness lists the pinned model in SupportedModels, dispatch falls back to fiz/openrouter as today. (Guards against over-aggressive preference.)
3. cd /Users/erik/Projects/fizeau && go test ./... green.
4. Existing routing tests pass: service_adr005_test.go, service_routing_test.go, internal/routing tests.
5. lefthook run pre-commit green.
